response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performers as members of holoX (Hakos Baelz, Kazama Iroha, La+ Darknesss, and Takane Lui) based on their character designs and the context of the performance. 2. Recognized the song during the performance from the lyrics and on-screen cues as '暁闇エクスデス' (Gyōan Exdeath) by the group 秘密結社holoX (Secret Society holoX). 3. Searched for the lyrics to '暁闇エクスデス' and confirmed the title and lyrics match the song performed in the video. 4. Divided the video into scenes based on performance, talk, and intro/outro segments.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance of the song "暁闇エクスデス" (Gyōan Exdeath) by members of the Hololive group Secret Society holoX (specifically Hakos Baelz, Kazama Iroha, La+ Darknesss, and Takane Lui) in front of a large, cheering crowd. The performance is framed by introductory and concluding talk segments from the performers.
